name: ASUS Prime B550M-A/CSM AMD AM4 (3rd Gen Ryzen) microATX Commercial Motherboard (PCIe 4.0, ECC Memory, 1Gb LAN, HDMI 2.1/D-Sub, 4K@60HZ, TPM, ASUS Control Center Express)
